_comment_setup: Copy this file to secrets.json (same folder) and fill in real values. secrets.json is gitignored. NEVER commit real keys — public repo bots scrape them within minutes.
_deepl_help: Get from https://www.deepl.com/account/summary > Auth Key. Free plan: 500K chars/month. Free keys end with `:fx`.
_crowdin_help: Get from Crowdin > Account Settings > API & SSO > New Token. Required scopes: Projects (Read & Write), Source Files, Translations.
